dbQueries: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(eps) as with_eps, COUNT(netIncome) as with_netIncome, COUNT(grossMargin) as with_grossMargin, COUNT(operatingMargin) as with_operatingMargin FROM FinancialReport;
SELECT year, quarter, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM FinancialReport GROUP BY year, quarter ORDER BY year DESC, quarter DESC LIMIT 12;

periodDistribution.note: All 957 rows are year=2025, quarter=4. Single-period bulk data.

sourcePresentReadiness.pitGateFieldNote: No releaseDate, releaseDateSource, or releaseDateConfidence field exists in schema. createdAt is ingestion timestamp only — not a PIT-safe release date. year/quarter fields identify the reporting period but do not establish when the report became publicly available.
sourcePresentReadiness.blockDetail: FinancialReport schema has no releaseDate field. Without a PIT-safe release date, it is not possible to determine whether a data row was available at a given evaluation timestamp. createdAt reflects ingestion time, not publication time. This creates look-ahead leakage risk if used without a dedicated releaseDate field.

requiredForUnblock: Add releaseDate (DateTime) column to FinancialReport schema via a new Prisma migration
Populate releaseDate using official TWSE/MOPS quarterly report publication dates or a deterministic inference policy (e.g., Q4 reports released by end of March following year)
Add releaseDateSource and releaseDateConfidence companion fields
This requires explicit DB migration authorization: YES apply FinancialReport releaseDate migration to dev DB
auditConclusion: FinancialReport table exists with 957 rows (all year=2025 quarter=4). Core financial metrics (eps, netIncome) are 100% populated. However, no PIT-safe release date metadata exists (no releaseDate, releaseDateSource, or releaseDateConfidence fields). Source-present dry-run gate is BLOCKED until a releaseDate field is added via authorized schema migration.
disclaimer: Structural audit contract only. Does not constitute investment advice. No profit, return, or investment performance claims are made. FinancialReport entersAlphaScore = false. ALWAYS. Results must not be used as buy/sell/hold signals or investment recommendations.
